relations.description: Integration base classes and `specify init` transform templates and scripts into downstream agent surfaces.
`pyproject.toml` force-includes templates, command partials, passive skills, project-map/testing templates, worker prompts, and scripts.
Codex team installer/runtime detects, packages, and controls optional engine assets from Python CLI surfaces.
Engine/runtime task execution and notify-hook paths feed Codex team state and result handoffs consumed by Python CLI commands.
Generated Codex skills and worker prompts describe how agents should use team runtime and structured handoffs.

shared_surfaces.risk: Changes affect most generated agent surfaces.
Changes propagate into downstream commands/skills and tests.
Changes affect Python CLI control plane and bundled engine assumptions.
Force-included asset changes alter install-time product contents.
